headerDisplay: Hunter Douglas PowerView plugin with Gen 1 hub support. All requests are serialized and retried automatically.

host.title: Hub IP Address or Hostname
host.description: IP address or hostname of your PowerView hub.

refreshShades.title: Refresh Shade Positions
refreshShades.description: Request fresh position data from shades on each poll (uses ?refresh=true). Causes the hub to query each shade via RF.

pollShadesForUpdate.title: Poll for Updates
pollShadesForUpdate.description: Periodically poll the hub for shade position changes.

pollIntervalMs.title: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll all shades for updates (default: 60s). Increase if your Gen 1 hub is unstable.

requestIntervalMs.title: Request Spacing (ms)
requestIntervalMs.description: Delay between queued requests to the hub (default: 500ms). Gen 1 hubs need 500ms+.

requestTimeoutMs.title: Request Timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.description: How long to wait for the hub to respond before timing out.

maxRetries.title: Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Number of retry attempts for transient errors (ECONNRESET, timeouts).

verifyCommands.title: Verify Commands
verifyCommands.description: After sending a shade command, re-read position to confirm it was applied. Fixes missed automations.

verifyDelayMs.title: Verify Delay (ms)
verifyDelayMs.description: How long to wait after a command before verifying the shade moved.

forceRollerShades.title: Force Roller Shade IDs
forceRollerShades.description: Shade IDs to force as roller type.

forceTopBottomShades.title: Force Top-Bottom Shade IDs
forceTopBottomShades.description: Shade IDs to force as top-bottom type.

forceHorizontalShades.title: Force Horizontal Shade IDs
forceHorizontalShades.description: Shade IDs to force as horizontal (Silhouette/Pirouette) type.

forceVerticalShades.title: Force Vertical Shade IDs
forceVerticalShades.description: Shade IDs to force as vertical (Luminette) type.
